sentences.arabic: طَلَبَ الأَبُ مِنْ وَلَدِهِ نُورٍ أَنْ يُنَظِّفَ غُرْفَتَهُ.
sentences.translation: Otac je zamolio svog sina Nura da počisti svoju sobu.
sentences.translationEn: The father asked his son Nour to clean his room.

sentences.arabic: لَمْ يُرِدْ نُورٌ فِي الْبِدَايَةِ لِأَنَّهُ كَانَ يَلْعَبُ.
sentences.translation: Nour u početku nije htio jer se igrao.
sentences.translationEn: Nour did not want to at first because he was playing.

sentences.translation: Ali je razmislio i odlučio poslušati oca.
sentences.translationEn: But he thought about it and decided to obey his father.

sentences.translation: Počistio je sobu i osjetio se ugodno i sretno.
sentences.translationEn: He cleaned the room and felt comfortable and happy.
